active_branch_goal: Phase 9 - Region Descriptors & Primitive Feature Extraction
end_goal_summary: A continuously learning, inspectable synthetic memory-and-attention engine that starts with location-grounded interpretation, normalizes every sensor into the same transformed ObservationBundle, wraps current input in ExperienceFrame state, writes generic MemoryUnit traces, and later supports activation, competition, replay, resurfacing, reconsolidation, and body-relative multimodal context without reducing the product to a robot location monitor.
notes: Workspace was empty when bootstrapping the project on 2026-03-26.
Tracking artifacts are the authoritative continuity state from the first write onward.
Phase 1 was accepted on 2026-03-26 after 6 automated tests and a manual CLI smoke sequence.
Phase 2 was accepted on 2026-03-28 after 30 automated tests.
Phase 3 was accepted before Phase 4 implementation started.
Phase 4 implementation started on 2026-03-28 with first-class label nodes, alias handling, rename history, rename/alias CLI commands, and richer inspect output.
On 2026-03-29 the roadmap was first revised to insert three location-focused phases before entity work, then replanned again into a perception-first ladder.

On 2026-03-30 the long-range plan was revised again so Phases 6-10 stay perception-first while Phases 11-28 converge on a synthetic memory-and-attention engine centered on ExperienceFrame capture, MemoryUnit writing, activation, thresholds, replay, resurfacing, and reconsolidation.
Runtime schema remains v5 with graph edges, concept nodes, sensor bindings, and provenance-aware evidence records.
Phase 4 was accepted on 2026-04-01 after a refreshed temp-runtime quiet-mode smoke run covering learned-span inference, rename, alias, and exact-fingerprint sensor recognition.

Phase 5 implementation began on 2026-04-01 with explicit contain/overlap CLI commands, relation-aware inspect output, deduplicated overlap storage, active-context feedback, and a committed house containment fixture pack.
Phase 5 was accepted on 2026-04-01 with 123 automated tests including cycle detection, context command, overlap validation, and the full containment/overlap smoke runs.
The automated regression suite now passes with 123 unittest cases including Phase 5 containment, overlap, cycle detection, context command, and media manifest coverage.

The repo now carries a committed image-first media ladder: `media/catalog.json`, `media/scenarios/`, generated Phase 4 and Phase 5 fixtures, and `MEDIA_PLAN.md` document how future phases must add sensor media before relying on it.

The current `sense /path/to/file` behavior remains active as an early exact-fingerprint preview, but later phases now route from transformed observation bundles and attended regions into generic memory traces, activation competition, replay, and body-relative context.
Phase 6 implementation added typed concept nodes (concept_kind field), validated relation rules, concept CRUD methods, concept/relate/concepts CLI commands, and schema v5->v6 migration.
Runtime schema is now v6 with concept_kind on ConceptNode and relation validation enforced at the storage layer.
The automated regression suite now passes with 146 unittest cases including Phase 6 concept CRUD, relation validation, CLI integration, and concept persistence coverage.

Phase 7 was accepted on 2026-04-02 with 153 automated tests. Exact-fingerprint sensor preview formalized as temporary baseline with SHA256 bindings, provenance_source=sensor, and explicit Phase 8 replacement notes.
The automated regression suite now passes with 153 unittest cases including Phase 7 sensor binding, multi-image recognition, wrong-guess correction, and temporary-preview documentation coverage.

Phase 8 implementation added ObservationBundle (13-field frozen dataclass), RegionDescriptor, SensorAdapter ABC, ImageAdapter, schema v6→v7 migration, bundle persistence (store_bundle/get_bundle/bind_sensor_bundle), adapter-routed sense flow, and extended EventLogger with bundle_id/adapter_id fields.
The automated regression suite now passes with 177 unittest cases including Phase 8 bundle validation, adapter contract, cross-adapter shape, bundle persistence, and schema migration coverage.
On 2026-04-29 the project added a parallel Release Track (R1–R13) that runs alongside the research roadmap; v1.0 ships when Research Phase 10 is accepted AND R1–R12 complete. See RELEASE_ROADMAP.md.

Release Phase R1 (Productization Foundation) was completed on 2026-04-29: src/ layout, pyproject.toml with tot console script, Apache-2.0 LICENSE, SECURITY.md, CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md, GitHub Actions CI matrix (Linux/macOS/Windows × Python 3.10/3.11/3.12) with ruff + mypy (advisory) + pytest + coverage ≥ 80%, CodeQL, Dependabot, TestPyPI publish workflow, pre-commit, issue/PR templates. Package version bumped to 0.6.0; 177 tests still pass; coverage 82%; sdist+wheel pass twine check.

Release Phase R2 (Core SDK Extraction & Public API) was completed on 2026-04-30: package version bumped to 0.7.0rc1; public surface frozen in location_agent.__all__; new Agent facade (learn_scalar/recognize_scalar/confirm_scalar/correct_scalar/sense/learn_sensor/inspect/reset) plus LearnResult / RecognitionResult dataclasses; MemoryStorage runtime-checkable Protocol with LocalJSONStore alias; _internal/ package with FirestoreStore stub for R3 and _deprecation helper; sensor-adapter plugin discovery via tot.adapters entry-point group with built-in image adapter registered in pyproject.toml; examples/example-adapter/ reference package; published JSON Schemas (observation_bundle, runtime_memory.v7); docs/api.md (SemVer policy) and docs/plugins.md (threat model); README SDK Quickstart; mypy --strict gating in CI (continue-on-error removed). Tests grew from 177 to 197 (test_public_api, test_agent_facade, test_plugin_discovery, test_schemas).

TestPyPI smoke test for tot-agent 0.7.0rc1 passed on 2026-05-03: pip install from TestPyPI succeeded in a clean venv; tot --help and __version__ == '0.7.0rc1' both confirmed. R3 (HTTP API & Hosted Storage) now active.
